ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unable to initialize. Trying to load Alpine before `<body>` is available. Did you forget to add `defer` in Alpine's `<script>` tag?
ast.target: 无法初始化。尝试在 `<body>` 可用之前加载 Alpine。您是否忘记在 Alpine 的 `<script>` 标签中添加 `defer`？

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cannot find directive `${directive}`. `${name}` will use the default order of execution
ast.target: 找不到指令 `${directive}`。`${name}` 将使用默认执行顺序

ast.name: warn
ast.source: x-for key cannot be an object, it must be a string or an integer
ast.target: x-for 的 key 不能是对象，必须是字符串或整数
